🚀 Big Launches.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more consumer-facing applications, with companies like Spotify and Google introducing AI-powered tools for everyday users.
